column1: # - With no pending forward marker: just removed from the token
#   stream (a no-op). Lets curry-style sequences include `end` as
#   a defensive terminator without breaking the surrounding flow.
# - With a pending marker: short-circuits forward collection. The
#   marker fires with whatever has been collected so far; if the
#   collected count is short of the sig's forward-arg count, we
#   raise signature_error (forward dispatch must have all sig

column3: no-op when there's no pending forward; empty stack
end after a fully-resolved dispatch is harmless
end after def's collection completes; subsequent x resolves
